title: BEM-865 Claude write test request
objective: Create a real Claude write selftest request through Curator, without writing the answer as GPT. Required: 1) Create governance/audit/mailbox/to_curator/BEM865_CLAUDE_WRITE_SELFTEST_REQUEST.md asking Curator to route a minimal write test to Claude. 2) Create governance/tasks/pending/CLAUDE_WRITE_SELFTEST_BEM865.md with Status: PENDING_CLAUDE_WRITE_TEST and instruction for Claude to write governance/audit/mailbox/from_claude/BEM865_CLAUDE_WRITE_SELFTEST_RESPONSE.md with exactly Status: CLAUDE_WRITE_OK. 3) Create governance/audit/mailbox/from_claude/BEM865_CLAUDE_WRITE_SELFTEST_RESPONSE.md with Status: PENDING_CLAUDE_WRITE_TEST. 4) Create governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM865_CLAUDE_WRITE_SELFTEST_STATE.md with Status: WAITING_FOR_CLAUDE_WRITE. Do not put CLAUDE_WRITE_OK yourself. Do not issue comments. No issue comments.
